_README: Per-input cluster overrides for the Moza matcher. Key format: 'device_short|itype|iid|mode' (mode * matches all). Use body_override when extract doesn't have a per-direction body for split switches.
_T-WPN_5way: T-WPN 5-way camera/power hat — chart already has subclusters, matcher picks them automatically. No override needed.
_T-COM_5way: T-COM 5-way comms/turret hat. 5 directions map 1:1 to phys btns 57-61 on the throttle.
_T-SW1_VTOL: T-SW1 VTOL switch. phys 25 = v_vtol_off, phys 26 = v_vtol_on. body_override needed since extract aggregates.
_T-SW2_Config_Turret: T-SW2 Config/Turret. phys 27 = transform_deploy (config up), phys 28 = transform_retract + turret_change_position (config down).
_T-SW3_LandingGear: T-SW3 Landing Gear. phys 29 = retract_landing_system, phys 30 = deploy_landing_system.
_T-E1_SpeedLimiter: T-E1 Speed Limiter encoder. phys 63 = increment, phys 64 = decrement.
_T-MODE_rotary: T-MODE 3-position rotary. phys 17 = set_nav, phys 19 = set_scm, phys 21 = set_mining+salvage, phys 36 (Nav Mode) = set_scm.
_T-M1_ministick: T-M1.press-in = Boost/SCM Limiter. phys 42 + 62 both fire press-in. Axes 1/2/4/5 are the 4 directions.
_MAIN-TRIG_stages: MAIN-TRIG dual-stage trigger. phys 1 = stage 1 (qdrive, scan), phys 6 = stage 2 (weapon fire).

00ed3200|button|1|SCM Mode.body_override: Stage 1 — Fire Selected Weapon Group / Fire Weapon Group 1 / [H] Engage Quantum / Fire Salvage Beam / Fire Mining Laser / Activate Scan

_Modifier_grip_to_BB: In Modifier mode, grip buttons (phys 1-8) are remapped to BB-row MFD actions. The chart's R-BB-N [M] entries document the BB-row's modifier-mode behavior; the grip-button modifier shadows duplicate those functions. Without these overrides, both phys 1+50 attribute to R-BB-1 [Mod] (over-attribution). These overrides keep the grip-button modifier descriptions at the grip's chart position with explanatory body_override. phys 2 Mod is intentionally NOT overridden — there's no BB-row phys input bound to MFD 2 actions, so phys 2 Mod is R-BB-2's sole attributor and covers that chart cluster naturally.

00ed3200|button|1|Modifier.body_override: [Modifier] MFD 1 Select / Cast Left Select (BB-row mirror)

00ed3200|button|4|Modifier.body_override: [Modifier] MFD 4 Select / Cycle MFD Page Backward (BB-row mirror)

00ed3200|button|5|Modifier.body_override: [Modifier] MFD 5 Select / Cast Right Select (BB-row mirror)

_dedup_T-M1_press_in: T-M1.press-in is hit by 4 phys paths (axis 4, axis 5, button 42, button 62) all firing afterburner/boost. Skip 3 duplicates; keep phys 62 (boost/jump) as the canonical press-in description.
_dedup_R-TGT_subitem: phys 57/58 do subitem cycling — R-TGT-style functions but chart doesn't have a subitem sub-cluster. Skip to reduce R-TGT over-attribution.
_dedup_R-DATA_missile: phys 24 = v_weapon_cycle_missile_back — fits R-DATA.left functionally but phys 15 already covers .left. Skip duplicate.
_dedup_R-PINKY_phys51: phys 51 has VOIP/notification layered on top of its primary MFD-3 / cast-right modifier bindings. Matcher attributes it to R-PINKY, double-up with phys 3 (the actual pinky button). Skip phys 51 descriptions — its bindings are documented via the chart's R-BB-3 / R-BB-5 [M] entries (already covered by phys 53 / phys 51's neighbors).
